summary: SMTP authentication bug fix verification completed. All backend tests PASSED: username fallback (blank smtp_user uses sender_email), password space stripping, real error surfacing, and regression tests. Frontend SMTP form verified in code (proper data-testids and placeholder text present in Account.jsx).

frontend_issues.notes: Frontend SMTP form exists with all required fields and proper data-testids in /app/frontend/src/pages/admin/Account.jsx. Could not verify via browser automation due to tenant routing in preview environment (X-Tenant header not propagating to client-side routing), but code review confirms all UI elements are present with correct placeholders.

passed_tests: ✓ SMTP auth test: 4/4 passed - username fallback works (blank smtp_user uses sender_email)
✓ SMTP auth test: password with spaces stripped correctly ('  secr etpass ' authenticates)
✓ SMTP auth test: wrong password returns 400 with real SMTP error (not swallowed)
✓ SMTP auth test: email delivered to authenticated SMTP server
✓ Email capture test: 2/2 passed - emails sent in background (non-blocking)
✓ Email capture test: booking fast even with unreachable SMTP
✓ POC isolation test: 35/35 passed - all tenant isolation and platform features working
✓ Backend API: login as superbrides owner successful
✓ Backend API: GET /auth/my-email-settings returns current settings
✓ Backend API: PUT /auth/my-email-settings saves with blank smtp_user (fallback test)
✓ Backend API: POST /auth/my-email-settings/test with no SMTP returns 400 with helpful error
✓ Code review: Account.jsx has all SMTP form fields with proper data-testids
✓ Code review: smtp-user placeholder says 'leave blank to use your sender email'
✓ Code review: Save (data-testid=save-smtp) and Send Test (data-testid=send-test-email) buttons present

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (code verified, UI elements present with correct attributes)
